sn35.3:1.1:
1
"Bhikkhus, the eye is nonself. What is nonself should be seen as it really is with correct wisdom thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self.’
sn35.3:1.2: "The ear is nonself … . The nose is nonself … . The tongue is nonself … . The body is nonself … . The mind is nonself. What is nonself should be seen as it really is with correct wisdom thus: ‘This is not mine, this I am not, this is not my self.’
sn35.3:1.3: "Seeing thus … He understands: ‘ … there is no more for this state of being.’"
